description: Fix new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted') with no category in linear-api.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/linear && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace new ToolError('aborted') with ToolError.timeout() in linear-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/linear/src/linear-api.ts, the catch block at lines 118-119 throws `new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted')` with no category. Replace with ToolError.timeout().
acceptanceCriteria: The `new ToolError('Request was aborted', 'aborted')` line is replaced with ToolError.timeout('Request was aborted') in linear-api.ts
